summary: Phase-2 Regelchunk: characteristics aus TSR Inc - AD&D 2nd Edition - Priest Spell Compendium Volume 1.pdf.

source_text.book: TSR Inc - AD&D 2nd Edition - Priest Spell Compendium Volume 1
source_text.source_file: TSR Inc - AD&D 2nd Edition - Priest Spell Compendium Volume 1.pdf
source_text.text:
[PDF_PAGE 67 | score=10] - - Bestow Minor Curse Change Skin Color: The subject’s skin changes to any hue of the caster’s choice. Chills: The subject suffers chills as with a fever, lowering reaction time and dropping overall Dexterity by 2 points. Continual Smiling: While not seeming much of a curse, this can result in many a skirmish. Many will he offended by the subject’s constant grin. Dancing: The subject breaks into a dance, jig, or caper at the most inopportune moments. Armor Class and saving throws have a -2 penalty, while spellcasting has a 20% chance of spell failure. Double Vision: The subject makes attack rolls at a -2 penalty; effective Dexterity is lowered by 2 points. Elasticity: The subject can stretc
[PDF_PAGE 223 | score=8] Drain Undead f must make a successful saving thmw vs. spell to reenter the area. The spell’s effectiveness can he greatly increased with the casting of a focus spell. The material components are the priest’s holy symbol and a dragon scale of any type. Notes: Common for to priests with major access to the sphere of Wards (TOM). Drain Undead Reversed form, undead regeneration. This form is used by good and neutral priests. Draw Upon Holy Might (Invocation) Sphere: Summoning Level: 2 Range: 0 Components: V, S, M Casting Time: 2 Duration: 1 rd./level Area of Effect: The caster Saving Throw: None When this spell is cast, the priest’s body shud- ders and glows with a shimmering aura as it be- come
[PDF_PAGE 16 | score=7] Age Cream \ The spell does not in any way conceal the identity of the one who gave the advice, and bad advice can often cause tmuble for the shukenja should those who follow it survive. Notes: Common for oriental priests; otherwise, very rare. Aerial Servant (ConjurationlSummoning) Sphere: Summoning Level 6 Range: 10 yds. Components: V, S Casting lime: 9 Duration: 1 daytlevel Area of Effect: Special Saving Throw: None This spell summons an invisible aerial servant to find and bring back an object or creature de- scribed to it by the priest. Unlike an elemental, an aerial servant cannot be commanded to fight for the caster. When it is summoned, the priest must have cast apmtectionfmm ail spel
[PDF_PAGE 59 | score=7] Beast Claw fl can make attacks against the caster with a -2 penalty. If the caster is also under the influence of a viperbite spell, the bite attack has a +2 bonus. Bear fur is the required material component. Notes: Very rare spell for druid‘s and similar nature priests. (Updated from DRAGON Magazine.) Beast Claw (Alteration, Necmmancy) Sphere: Combat, Necromantic Level: 2 Range: 0 Components: V, S Casting Time: 5 Duration: 1 rd.flevel Area of Effect: The caster Saving Throw: None This spell temporarily transforms the caster’s arms into extremely durable furry limbs with raking talons allowing two rending attacks (one per claw) at a +2 bonus, for ld4+2 points of damage each. The caster can 
[PDF_PAGE 12 | score=6] Accelerate Healing its effect is delayed from taking effect for 1 round, and the abeyance dissipates thereafter. Notes: Very rare spell from the FOROUITEN REALMS setting. Ability Alteration (Alteration) Sphere: Creation Level 3 Range: 0 Components: V Casting Time: 6 Duration: 1 turn + 5 rdsJlevel Area of Effect: The caster Saving Thrnw: None By means of this spell, the priest can enhance one or more of his physical abilities by temporar- ily suppressing another physical ability. The priest can expend ability points from one physical ability to gain ability points in another. The ratio is 2 points expended to 1 gained. No ability score can be reduced below 8 by this spell, nor can racial maxi
[PDF_PAGE 286 | score=6] Formnate Fate > Fortitude - Drow (N=TOllUUlCY) Sphere: Necromantic Level: 2 Range: Touch Components: V, S, M Casting Time: 5 Duration: 2 rds.nevel Area of Effect: Creature touched Saving Throw: None This spell gives the recipient the ability to ignore mow1 wounds and continue fighting. The creature, after being brought to 0 hit points or less, can fight normally for Id61 with a hit point total of -1 to -9 before collapsing. A creature brought to -10 hit points or less dies immediately. The spell effect ends once the creature dies or collapses into unconsciousness. The material components are the caster's holy symbol and several drops of cave bear blood Notes: Granted by the drow god Selvetm,
[PDF_PAGE 24 | score=5] saving throw vs. spell to avoid the effect. Affected creatures that leave the area still suffer the effect until the spell expires. The material component of the spell is a frag- ment of a turtle’s shell. Notes: Granted hy the sun god Amaunator of the FORWITEN REALMS setting. Amber Prison - Elf (Coqjuration) Sphere: Plant Level: 4 Range: Touch Components: V, S, M Casting Time: 7 Duration: Special Area of Effect: Creature touched Saving Throw: Neg. This spell encases the target creature in a hard, translucent coating of fossil resin of yellow, orange, or brownish-yellow hue. If the creature makes a successful saving throw vs. spell, this spell dissipates without effect. If the creature is al-
[PDF_PAGE 109 | score=5] Chain Creation f Chain Creation :nvocationlEvncation) phere: Creation evel: 5 ange: 30 yds. omponents: V, S, M 'asting Time: 8 Nuration: Special .rea of Effect: 1 created item aving Throw: None cl Ci 01 is CI LLLC umc cup,ca pruuwcu vy 1111s sp=u LasLJUsL as long as the copied item (tha istence is governed by the ori few rounds to permanent). PI ated by this spell are independc ___, This spell works only on the output of priestly ~lls in the sphere of creation and on those pro- iced by a wizard's use of the minor creation spell. When such magics are successfully worked, a iain creation spell cast within 1 turn after their sting makes three identical copies of whatever the her magic created.
